name: Blazing Shield
description:
Surround yourself with solar rays, applying Minor Maim to nearby enemies for 10 seconds, reducing their damage done by 5%.

You gain a damage shield that absorbs up to 4800 damage for 6 seconds, increasing by 10% for each enemy hit, up to 60%. This ability scales off your Max Health.

When the shield expires it explodes, dealing 33% of damage absorbed as Magic Damage to nearby enemies.
